results.QueryPreview: INSERT INTO ETL_STAGING.fact_sales SELECT s.*, d.region FROM source_db.raw_sales s JOIN source_db.region_map d ON s.region_code = d.code WHERE sale_date >= DATE - 1
SELECT region, product_line, fiscal_quarter, SUM(revenue) AS total_rev FROM PROD_DW.fact_revenue GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY total_rev DESC
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(s.amount) FROM PROD_DW.fact_sales s CROSS JOIN PROD_DW.dim_customer c GROUP BY 1
INSERT INTO PROD_DW.fact_revenue SELECT * FROM ETL_STAGING.stg_revenue WHERE load_date = DATE - 1
SELECT d.customer_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(s.amount) AS total FROM PROD_DW.fact_sales s JOIN PROD_DW.dim_customer d ON s.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY 1
